final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign.

Style/medium: needs a complex-yet-structured commercial poster aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typography stacking with artistic lettering; must have a product or hero subject physically overlapping and partially obscuring some of the type layers
Subject: must include a hero product or focal subject that overlaps the text layers
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, attention-grabbing direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include artistic lettering (艺术字); must include font/type stacking (字体堆叠); composition must feel visually rich and complex but remain organized and non-chaotic; product/subject must occlude portions of the background type
Avoid: visual clutter or disorganized layout
